message:
test(unit): expand setup.rs inline tests (47→127) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 80 new inline unit tests covering:
- Helper functions: strip_inline_comment, split_key_value, strip_quotes,
  lua_escape, redact_identity_path, is_wildcard_host
- Internal functions: find_return_line_start, insert_ft_block,
  create_shell_ft_block
- SshHost: redacted_identity_files, clone/eq/debug
- SSH config parsing edge cases: empty, comments-only, wildcards,
  duplicate host merging, equals syntax, quoted values, invalid port,
  multiple identity files, case-insensitive keys, multi-alias Host
- generate_ssh_domains_lua: empty hosts, special char escaping,
  no port/user, hostname fallback to alias
- Trait coverage: ShellType Copy/Clone/Debug/Eq, PatchResult,
  DetectionStep, WizardChoice, WizardResult
- extract_ft_block edge cases: no markers, reversed markers, no newline
- patch_wezterm_config_block_at missing markers validation
- Wizard accessors: environment(), auto_config()
- Shell snippet validation: bash/zsh/fish marker coverage
- Constants validation: marker strings, USERVAR_FORWARDING_LUA

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
